name: OTA server certificate validation
description: Ensure OTA servers authenticate via pinned SSL roots.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper ota server certificate validation settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on OTA server certificate validation. Attackers could exploit these unhardened parameters to launch privileges escalation actions.", "technical_impact": "Failed control allows unapproved subsystem bindings, breaking sandboxing isolation or inter-process communications.", "fix_steps": "Modify system properties. If automated, configure the parameter `ota_cert_pinning=enabled` in your config payload and deploy.", "config_example": "ota_cert_pinning=enabled", "validation_steps": "sdb shell tizen_check_security --control=UTSCF-PVM-02", "cost": "HIGH", "estimated_time_hours": 6}
